'''zagotho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:fodinichnion|fodinichnion]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-g-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fodinichnion|fodinichnion]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zagotho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zægetheth|zægetheth]] || [[word:zægethej|zægethej]] || [[word:zægethesh|zægethesh]] || [[word:zægethe|zægethe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zagogothoth|zagogothoth]] || [[word:zagogothoj|zagogothoj]] || [[word:zagogothosh|zagogothosh]] || [[word:zagogotho|zagogotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zagothoth|zagothoth]] || [[word:zagothoj|zagothoj]] || [[word:zagothosh|zagothosh]] || [[word:zagotho|zagotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zagofthoth|zagofthoth]] || [[word:zagofthoj|zagofthoj]] || [[word:zagofthosh|zagofthosh]] || [[word:zagofthof|zagofthof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zagothotho|zagothotho]] || [[word:zagothojo|zagothojo]] || [[word:zagothosho|zagothosho]] || [[word:zagothoko|zagothoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zagothoth|zagothoth]] || [[word:zagothoj|zagothoj]] || [[word:zagothosh|zagothosh]] || [[word:zagotho|zagotho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zagothothol|zagothothol]] || [[word:zagothojol|zagothojol]] || [[word:zagothoshol|zagothoshol]] || [[word:zagothokol|zagothokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zagothothotho|zagothothotho]] || [[word:zagothojojo|zagothojojo]] || [[word:zagothoshosho|zagothoshosho]] || [[word:zagothoko|zagothoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zagothothon|zagothothon]] || [[word:zagothojon|zagothojon]] || [[word:zagothoshon|zagothoshon]] || [[word:zagothokon|zagothokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zagothothoro|zagothothoro]] || [[word:zagothojoro|zagothojoro]] || [[word:zagothoshoro|zagothoshoro]] || [[word:zagothokoro|zagothokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|27df60f}}
